pattern: A traversal only pins down a tree when the missing children are written too — record explicit null markers and the same walk that produced the string can rebuild the exact shape.
hints: Any single traversal without null markers is ambiguous: several trees share the same value order.
Emit a marker for every absent child during a preorder walk, joining tokens with a separator that cannot appear inside a number.
Deserialize by consuming tokens in the same preorder order: a value makes a node and recurses twice, a marker returns null.

edge_inputs.description: negative and multi-digit values must survive tokenization
identical values everywhere — shape alone distinguishes

stress.description: random tree shapes built by attaching each new node to a random open slot
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(0, max(1, min(size, 80)))
    if n == 0:
        return [[]]
    nodes = [[rng.randint(-1000, 1000), None, None]]
    for _ in range(n - 1):
        open_nodes = [x for x in nodes if x[1] is None or x[2] is None]
        parent = rng.choice(open_nodes)
        node = [rng.randint(-1000, 1000), None, None]
        if parent[1] is None and (parent[2] is not None or rng.random() < 0.5):
            parent[1] = node
        else:
            parent[2] = node
        nodes.append(node)
    out = []
    queue = [nodes[0]]
    while queue:
        cur = queue.pop(0)
        if cur is None:
            out.append(None)
            continue
        out.append(cur[0])
        queue.append(cur[1])
        queue.append(cur[2])
    while out and out[-1] is None:
        out.pop()
    return [out]
